name: Indulgent Northern Vietnam: 7 Days of Luxury & Scenic Wonders
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Bich Dong Pagoda - Tam Coc - Mua Cave - Trang An - Halong Bay
highlights: "Sightseeing the ace historical relics of Hanoi 1000 years civilization
Take part in a countryside discovery to Incense village Quang Phu Cau, Bich Dong Pagoda, and release your soul with Tam Coc boat trip
Conquer Ngoa Long Mountain on the Mua Cave peak and settle down on Trang An Grottoes on sampan
Experience a 5-star overnight cruise in Halong Bay Natural World Heritage"

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Welcome to Vietnam's Capital
itinerary.description:
Welcome to Vietnam! BestPrice Travel Guide will greet you at Noi Bai International Airport, and then transfer you to the hotel for check-in. The usual check-in time is 14:00, if you want to check in early, please contact your travel consultant. The rest time is your leisure, freely prepare energy for the next day or explore the street Hanoi culinary with this optional:

Hanoi Street Food Walking Tour 

	

   FROM US $29 /pax

itinerary.title: Discover Hanoi’s Timeless Charm on a City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Have a full breakfast at the hotel and power for a sightseeing day in Hanoi civilization. 8:00: Our guide will meet you again at the lobby. Follow his/her feet, you will be led to visit top-rated historical landmarks on the car. The first spot is the first university in Vietnam, the Temple of Literature, built in the Ly Dynasty. This place not only symbolizes Confucianism but is also the birthplace of many outstanding individuals through many generations

itinerary.title: Quang Phu Cau Incense Village - Bich Dong Pagoda - Tam Coc
itinerary.description:
Morning 

08:00: Embark to Quang Phu Cau Incense Village from your hotel after a full breakfast and check-out process. In a 1.5-hour drive, you will escape from the city hustle and capture the peaceful scene of Vietnam's countryside. After Reaching the serene village, we stroll around and witness the incense-making process by locals: bamboo chopping, dipping the sticks in the dye, creating incense paste, and drying the incense in the sun…

Happy to interact with the locals to deeply understand the history of the old-standing incense-making profession. And don’t forget to pose with a colorful b...

itinerary.title: Mua Cave & Trang An Boat Ride
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Please fill your power in breakfast cause this day requires full health to travel 

Gather with our guide and go to Mua Cave, a majestic destination in Ninh Binh for photo enthusiasts and photographers thanks to its stunning views from the mountaintop above. We will begin a journey to climb to the top of Ngoa Long Mountain. Standing on the mountain peak, you can enjoy priceless natural scenery while gazing at the astonishing rice valley. Recharge with a delicious lunch at a local restaurant

Afternoon 

When your health has already cooled off, we go to the last point, Trang An Grotto...

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh - Scenic Drive to Halong - Embark on a Luxurious Cruise Journey
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Relish the breakfast amidst a peaceful morning in Ninh Binh and check out. Then a luxury bus will take you head to Halong Bay World Heritage for a cruise trip. Upon arriving at the cruise’s waiting lounge in Halong, you will be warmly welcomed by cruise staff and check in quickly. Transfer to the speedboat to get the cruise, during that time, the cruise manager will introduce you to safety instructions and stories about the bay. Embark on the cruise around 12:15, the captain and cruise crew greet you with a welcome drink

Morning 

Around 6:00: A Tai Chi class is opened for early birds who want to practice health or just let their hair down among the fresh air from the room. Fulfill with a light breakfast and continue the outing. Get to the further spots to understand the lifestyle in the fishing village or chill out and immerse yourself in the water. Return to the cruise to refresh and recharge with the last complete brunch. Please process the check out at 10:00 - 10:30 whistle cruising towards the pier

itinerary.title: Departure - Farewell to Vietnam’s Elegance
itinerary.description: Delight the last breakfast in Hanoi and check out before 12:00. Our driver will transfer you to the airport for your departure flight. We are honored to accompany you to Vietnam for 6 days. Wish you a safe flight, and see you on the next journey!

included: Meal as stated in the itinerary (B: Breakfast, L: Lunch, D: Dinner)
Accommodation 3 nights in Hanoi, 2 nights in Ninh Binh, 1 night on Ha Long Bay Cruise
All transfers by private air-conditioned vehicle
All the excursions and visits mentioned.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
